# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:alpine

# Install system utilities
RUN apk update && apk add --no-cache bash 
RUN apk add --no-cache curl
RUN apk add --no-cache git
RUN apk add --no-cache vim
RUN apk add --no-cache openssl
RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates

# Install build tools
RUN apk add --no-cache build-base
RUN apk add --no-cache python3
RUN apk add --no-cache make
RUN apk add --no-cache gcc
RUN apk add --no-cache g++

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY package*.json ./

# Install Node.js dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Expose application's port
EXPOSE 3000

# Command to run the application
CMD ["node", "app.js"]
